title: crotalaria rosenii
intro: Crotalaria rosenii, also known as Karam, is a plant species in the legume family Fabaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its potential in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Crotalaria rosenii include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Crotalaria rosenii is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, as well as being used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
